scripts.dev: ED_DB_PATH="$PWD/data/app.db" ED_WA_PROFILE_DIR="$PWD/data/wa-profile" concurrently -k -n web,worker -c blue,magenta "npm -w @event-drafter/web run dev" "npm -w @event-drafter/worker run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @event-drafter/core run build && npm -w @event-drafter/worker run build && npm -w @event-drafter/web run build
